source_jobs.title: Physician (Per Diem)
source_jobs.description:
Blueberry's Mission:

Our mission is to turn every family’s living room into their own personal pediatric urgent care. We combine home exam kits, concierge-like access, and AI-enabled Pediatricians to provide affordable and near-instant clinic-level care, 24/7. We believe every child deserves access to top-quality healthcare.

We’ve proven that by drastically improving access and turning healthcare into a consumer-grade experience, we drive better health outcomes for children and families while dramatically reducing medical costs for parents and health plans (up to 50% reduction in ED costs).

We are a mission and values driven company. You can learn more about our values HERE https://drive.google.com/file/d/1WbORoU9L17875Re3r0psjPcALDGUvDMa/view. 🫐 💙



Note: Beware of Scammers. Blueberry will NEVER ask you to download software/apps or request sensitive personal information like bank accounts or social security numbers. If you received an email requesting this information it is likely a scam. We are only accepting candidates through our job board.



BEFORE READING THROUGH THE JOB DESCRIPTION, PLEASE NOTE THAT WE ARE NOT CURRENTLY HIRING ADDITIONAL PHYSICIANS. IF YOU ARE INTERESTED IN JOINING BLUEBERRY PEDIATRICS, PLEASE PROCEED WITH SUBMITTING AN APPLICATION AND WE WILL FOLLOW UP WITH YOU WHEN WE BEGIN HIRING AGAIN (IF YOUR BACKGROUND AND LICENSES MATCH OUR NEEDS AT THAT TIME). WE ANTICIPATE RE-EVALUATING OUR STAFFING NEEDS A COUPLE MONTHS BEFORE NEXT COLD/FLU SEASON! THANK YOU!!



The Opportunity:

Blueberry is on a mission to make high quality pediatric care available to everyone. In this role, you will join a wonderful community of physicians who are fueled by that mission. Beyond that, you’ll have the opportunity to do what you do best REMOTELY!. Our physicians love being a part of Blueberry for three key reasons:

 1. They get to practice high-quality, evidence based medicine.

 2. Their voices matter and our Chief Medical Officer is a pediatrician who represents the voices of the doctors at the executive level.

 3. They may be home alone, but they never feel alone. We are a community of doctors who help each other out!
    

Who You Are:

 - You are responsible and self-motivated. We do not micromanage. 

 - You uphold Blueberry’s values https://drive.google.com/file/d/1WbORoU9L17875Re3r0psjPcALDGUvDMa/view. You are committed to making sure that every parent has a great experience.

 - You are empathetic. You do a great job of making parents feel heard and understood.

 - You are a person of integrity. We do not prescribe just to satisfy parents. We practice evidence based medicine. We expect all Blueberry doctors to uphold that bar.

 - You are a collaborative partner to our other doctors and our customer support team, with whom you will work to ensure holistic patient care.



Role Details/Requirements:

 - This is a 1099 contract role.

 - You are expected to fulfill a minimum 10-12 hours of on-call time per week*, primarily during high volume hours (4p - 1a EST) and on weekends. Shifts are 3 hours long.

 - In addition to shift hours, we ask that you pick up overflow visits when not on call (you will be compensated $25 per overflow visit you take while not on call). This is a great way to make quick money!

 - It is expected that you accomplish at least 4 or more visits per hour. You will be compensated at a higher hourly rate if you are able to do more than that (ask us for more info).

 - You are an experienced multitasker and are well versed in managing an EMR.

 - You have no conflict of interest with your current job at a competing pediatric telehealth company.



Okay so….Why Work At Blueberry?

Need more convincing? Trust us, we know what the clinical world is like. That’s why we want to make sure that our doctors experience benefits that most clinics would never offer. Such as:

 - Contribute to a mission-driven health-tech company that is out to improve the child healthcare experience!

 - Amazing camara

Role Details/Requirements:

 - This is a 1099 contract role.

 - You are expected to fulfill a minimum 20-30 hours of on-call time per week*, predominantly (at minimum 75%) extended weekend hours (from Friday at 4pm through Monday end of day EST). Blueberry does not guarantee all of these hours be scheduled for pay (ex. low volume months like summer)
   
   - May include some overnight hours (1am - 7am EST)
   
   - Time frame subject to change

 - In addition to shift hours, we ask that you pick up overflow visits when not on call (you will be compensated $25 per overflow visit you take while not on call). This is a great way to make quick money!

 - It is expected that you accomplish at least 5 or more visits per hour. You will be compensated at a higher hourly rate if you are able to do more than that (ask us for more info).

 - You are an experienced multitasker and are well versed in managing an EMR.

 - You have no conflict of interest with your current job at a competing pediatric telehealth company.



Holiday Hour Requirement:

 - Major holidays - 6 hours total required (2 shifts)

 - Days around major holidays - 9 hours required (3 shi

source_jobs.title: Senior or Staff Full-stack Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Blueberry's Mission:

Our mission is to turn every family’s living room into their own personal pediatric urgent care. We combine home exam kits, concierge-like access, and AI-enabled Pediatricians to provide affordable and near-instant clinic-level care, 24/7. We believe every child deserves access to top-quality healthcare.

We’ve proven that by drastically improving access and turning healthcare into a consumer-grade experience, we drive better health outcomes for children and families while dramatically reducing medical costs for parents and health plans (up to 50% reduction in ED costs).

We are a mission and values driven company. You can learn more about our values HERE https://drive.google.com/file/d/1WbORoU9L17875Re3r0psjPcALDGUvDMa/view. 🫐 💙



Note: Beware of Scammers. Blueberry will NEVER ask you to download software/apps or request sensitive personal information like bank accounts or social security numbers. If you received an email requesting this information it is likely a scam. We are only accepting candidates through our job board.



About the opportunity:

We build technology that connects parents with pediatricians through two core platforms: our parent-facing experience https://apps.apple.com/us/app/blueberry-pediatrics/id1444477436 and our physician platform. Both are written in Django https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/5.1/ and Hotwire https://hotwired.dev/ (an HTMX-like framework). Experience in these technologies helps, but what’s more important is general full-stack knowledge, curiosity, and a strong work ethic.

Here are some projects we’ve shipped recently that illustrate what you might be working on:

 - Developing an eardrum detection model to reduce the time doctors spend triaging images.

 - Adding screeners that track developmental milestones for children. These help parents identify potential issues for early intervention.

 - Building an algorithm that flags at-risk children so doctors see them as soon as possible.

 - Adding WebRTC to our in-house EMR to improve call reliability.

 - Rewriting our React Native parent app in Hotwire to simplify our stack.

Engineers work closely with our product managers to bring features to life. (We have the luxury of working with a best-in-class product team!) We also collaborate with people in other functions, like the physician or marketing team. You can learn more about how we collaborate under the “Culture @ Blueberry” section here https://www.blueberrypediatrics.com/careers.



About you

We’re seeking product engineers who are strong full-stack generalists. From writing HTML to optimizing SQL queries and managing deployment infrastructure, you enjoy mastering every layer of the stack. You have lots of experience in MVC frameworks, like Django or Ruby on Rails.

You deeply understand the products you work on. You start with business objectives, then work backward to technical solutions. You use data to validate assumptions and measure impact. You're pragmatic and know when to optimize for speed versus scalability.

We reward impact over complexity. You seek simple, maintainable solutions. You embrace the chance to solve a problem with a non-technical alternative.

Engineers at Blueberry are given agency to own projects, from conception to production. You are energized by autonomy and have a track record of being a Manager of One https://signalvnoise.com/posts/1430-hire-managers-of-one. You implement high-quality software, have experience leading people and projects, and own the rollout and maintenance of your work. You proactively find and fix bugs, document systems, and evangelize fixing tech debt.

For Senior roles, you must have more than four years of experience working as a software engineer. For Staff roles, we require a minimum of six years of experience. Beyond years of experience, your demonstrated ability to solve challenging problems will also influence final leveling decisions.



Next steps

Our interview process follows this structure:

source_jobs.title: Senior Accountant
source_jobs.description:
Blueberry's Mission:

Our mission is to turn every family’s living room into their own personal pediatric urgent care. We combine home exam kits, concierge-like access, and AI-enabled Pediatricians to provide affordable and near-instant clinic-level care, 24/7. We believe every child deserves access to top-quality healthcare.

We’ve proven that by drastically improving access and turning healthcare into a consumer-grade experience, we drive better health outcomes for children and families while dramatically reducing medical costs for parents and health plans (up to 50% reduction in ED costs).

We are a mission and values driven company. You can learn more about our values HERE https://drive.google.com/file/d/1WbORoU9L17875Re3r0psjPcALDGUvDMa/view. 🫐 💙



Note: Beware of Scammers. Blueberry will NEVER ask you to download software/apps or request sensitive personal information like bank accounts or social security numbers. If you received an email requesting this information it is likely a scam. We are only accepting candidates through our job board.



The Opportunity:

We are seeking a versatile and detail-oriented Accountant to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for a wide array of accounting functions, including invoicing, collections, vendor invoice processing, month-end close, and statutory reporting. The initial focus of this position will be the migration of historical accounting data into our new internal ERP system (such as QuickBooks). Upon successful completion of migration, the role will transition into a full-time position as the company’s Controller, with expanded responsibilities in financial oversight and leadership.




WHAT YOU'LL OWN:

 - ERP Data Migration (primary focus for remainder of 2026):
   
   - Migrate and reconcile historical accounting data from legacy systems to the new ERP platform (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage, NetSuite).
   
   - The company has 5 legal entities to manage and consolidate although only 2 of the 5 have payroll activities.
   
   - Ensure accuracy, completeness, and integrity of all migrated financial records.
   
   - Collaborate with internal stakeholders to identify and resolve data discrepancies during migration.

 - Invoicing & Collections:
   
   - Prepare and issue customer invoices in a timely manner (one invoicing cycle per month).
   
   - Monitor accounts receivable and proactively follow up on outstanding balances.
   
   - Coordinate with clients to resolve billing issues and ensure prompt collections.

 - Vendor Invoice Processing:
   
   - Review, code, and process vendor invoices for payment.
   
   - Maintain accurate records of accounts payable transactions.
   
   - Communicate with vendors to address discrepancies or queries.
   
   - Record payment on invoices as either prepaid expenses where appropriate and amortize to income statement over the life of the service period.

 - Month-End Close:
   
   - Prepare and post journal entries, accruals, and adjustments as needed.
   
   - Reconcile general ledger accounts and ensure financial statements are accurate and timely.
   
   - Assist with internal and external audits as required.

 - Statutory Reporting:
   
   - Prepare and file required financial reports in compliance with local, state, and federal regulations.
   
   - Support tax filings and coordinate with external tax advisors as necessary.




EXPERIENCE YOU'LL NEED:

 - Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field; CPA or equivalent certification preferred.

 - Proven experience handling end-to-end accounting functions, including invoicing, collections, payables, and reporting.

 - Hands-on experience with ERP systems and data migration projects.

 - Strong knowledge of GAAP and statutory reporting requirements.

 - Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software.

 - Excellent analytical, organizational, and communication skills.

 - Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced enviro

source_jobs.title: Nurse Practitioner
source_jobs.description:
Blueberry's Mission:

Our mission is to turn every family’s living room into their own personal pediatric urgent care. We combine home exam kits, concierge-like access, and AI-enabled Pediatricians to provide affordable and near-instant clinic-level care, 24/7. We believe every child deserves access to top-quality healthcare.

We’ve proven that by drastically improving access and turning healthcare into a consumer-grade experience, we drive better health outcomes for children and families while dramatically reducing medical costs for parents and health plans (up to 50% reduction in ED costs).

We are a mission and values driven company. You can learn more about our values HERE https://drive.google.com/file/d/1WbORoU9L17875Re3r0psjPcALDGUvDMa/view. 🫐 💙



Note: Beware of Scammers. Blueberry will NEVER ask you to download software/apps or request sensitive personal information like bank accounts or social security numbers. If you received an email requesting this information it is likely a scam. We are only accepting candidates through our job board.



The Opportunity:
Blueberry is on a mission to make high quality pediatric care available to everyone. In this role, you will join a wonderful community of physicians who are fueled by that mission and have the opportunity to help build our inaugural team of nurse practitioners.

Our practitioners love being a part of Blueberry for three key reasons:

 1. They get to practice high-quality, evidence based medicine

 2. Their voices matter and shape the future of pediatric telehealth

 3. They may be home alone, but they never feel alone. We are a community of clinicians who help each other out!



Who You Are:

 - A board certification Pediatric Nurse Practitioner (PNP) or Family Nurse Practitioner (FNP) with significant pediatric clinical experience, with an active license in at least (1) state

 - You are responsible and self-motivated. We do not micromanage.

 - You uphold Blueberry’s values. You are committed to making sure that every parent has a great experience and every child gets great care.

 - You are empathetic. You do a great job of making parents feel heard and understood.

 - You are a person of integrity. We do not prescribe just to satisfy parents.. We practice evidence based medicine. We expect all Blueberry clinicians to uphold that bar.

 - You are a collaborative partner to other medical staff and our customer support team, with whom you will work to ensure holistic patient care



Role Details, Schedule & Shift Expectations***:

 - 1099 Contract

 - You will work 70-80 hours per month
   
   - Shifts are typically 4-8 hour blocks of time
   
   - 20% of time expected to be on weekends

 - You are expected to work all shift times evenly
   
   - Evening and weekend shifts split fairly among group
   
   - Expanded shift times and overnight hours may be needed in the future

 - You are eligible to earn extra income via contributing during surge times, marketing efforts, and other opportunities

***As a young company, growth requires change. Flexibility will be needed.



Holidays:

 - Major holidays - Must work 1 of 3 major holidays (rotating basis)
   
   - Thanksgiving
   
   - Christmas Eve
   
   - Christmas Day

 - Minor holidays - Required hours split over 2-3 holidays
   
   - Martin Luther King Day: Jan 15
   
   - Presidents Day Weekend: Feb 19
   
   - Easter Weekend: March 31, April 1
   
   - Memorial Day Weekend: May 27
   
   - July 4th Weekend: July 4
   
   - Labor Day Weekend: September 2
   
   - New Years Weekend: December 31, Jan 1
   
   - Juneteenth

Need more convincing? Trust us, we know what the clinical world is like. That’s why we want to make sure that our medical team experiences benefits that most clinics would never offer. Such as:

 - Market competitive compensation

 - Stipend for remote office supplies

 - All initial licensure paid by company and partial renewal reimbursement
